programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: I Can't Get No Satisfaction
programme.desc: Still wanting to merge their worlds together, Bill organizes a dinner for Bri's mom, Sharon, and his ex-wife Kathleen to resolve tensions, but soon he becomes the target.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Birthdays, Babies, and Blowups
programme.desc: Rodney finally caves to Desiry's demands and introduces her to his parents. However, Desiry quickly learns that some secrets may be better left in the closet.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Mother's Point of View
programme.desc: Bill is in the dog house after a disastrous dinner with Bri's parents, so to make things right he surprises Bri with a magical trip to reconnect.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: An Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: After a rocky dinner with Reese's family, Nonie makes a big decision about their relationship. Things don't go according to plan when Kattie sets up a double date with Kevin and her best friend Natalie.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Rough Waters Ahead
programme.desc: Bill tries to adjust to Bri's mother Sharon moving into the house, but things quickly go south, leaving Bri torn between Bill and her family.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: After telling Desiry about his infidelity, Rodney has to pull off an all or nothing plan in hopes of winning Desiry's hand. Rick travels to Illinois to beg forgiveness after proposing to Erica and neglecting to ask her father first.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Put a Ring (Back) On It
programme.desc: Rodney's proposal could go either way since Desiry might not forgive him for his past betrayal. Bri realizes their 12,000 square foot mansion isn't enough to separate the tension between her mom and Bill.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Marriage Material
programme.desc: At their engagement party, Rodney faces the heat head on when Desiry's friend confronts him about his infidelity. Bill's parents pay him a visit, and Bri is under pressure to prove to them that she's marriage material.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre
programme.desc: When five family members are found brutally murdered in the small Oklahoma city of Broken Arrow, police are on the hunt for a mass murder.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo
programme.desc: Savanna Greywind couldn’t wait to be a mom. But just before her baby is due, the pregnant 22-year-old disappears from her own apartment. When the baby turns up alive, the investigation reveals a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College
programme.desc: College lacrosse player Yeardley Love is found dead in her college apartment. But the community is left stunned when cops arrest a member of a wealthy, prominent family.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall
programme.desc: OKC and Texas compete in an old school Cash Days race. Eight drivers from each state race for over $30,000 and the chance to prove that their state has the fastest racers in the country, but a sketchy road throws a wrench into the works for both sides.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb
programme.desc: On the second night of Cash Days, 405 racers must match up and race, while still fighting to knock out the only remaining Texas driver. The sketchy road is still in play, and it becomes a tuner's game to see who can get down the street in one piece.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Rise of the OG
programme.desc: A horrific crash devastates the 405 as Kamikaze returns to defend The List against a new racer hoping to earn a spot. Shawn makes a big change in an attempt to turn things around and Ryan Martin wastes no time calling out Monza.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Grinding on the Daily
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: Farmtruck and AZN bring back the Daily Driver contest where racers in a variety of rides compete for big dough.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Aftermath
programme.desc: Big Chief struggles with PTSD after his crash while the 405 racers return to intense list racing. Meanwhile, Doc and Monza try to dethrone Shawn and Dave finally faces Jackie in the Sonoma. Plus, Farmtruck searches for AZN's first car.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Aftermath
programme.desc: Big Chief struggles with PTSD after his crash while the 405 racers return to intense list racing. Meanwhile, Doc and Monza try to dethrone Shawn and Dave finally faces Jackie in the Sonoma. Plus, Farmtruck searches for AZN's first car.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Deep in New Mexico's Chihuahuan Desert, Joe struggles to get out of an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Stranded in a mangrove swamp in Sri Lanka, Joe and Cody escape the crocodile-filled waters only to find themselves in a leech-infested jungle. But this time, distressed elephants interrupt their journey back and they may not get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Joe comes face-to-face with elephants and is forced off a cliff, Cody masters the ancient fire piston, and they cross a crocodile-infested lake to escape the longest survival scenario in history of 'Dual Survival.'

programme.title: Dual Survival: The Green Hell
programme.desc: Joe and Cody learn how to stay alive on the world's deadliest river, if they can keep from killing each other first.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Castaways
programme.desc: Joe and Cody face unpredictable and punishing tropical storms and brave shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Amateurs compete to make absinthe.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Callus Catastrophe!
programme.desc: Nate sees Dr. Brad for help with the raging calluses on his feet. Savannah has a rare condition that made her big toe grow to an enormous size and hopes Dr. Ebonie can help. Dr. Brad is determined to uncover the mystery behind John's massive foot growth.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back
programme.desc: Amy counts down the days until her delivery with an eccentric photo shoot, while the family worries that Jerry is derailing Tammy's diet. Tammy reveals her big secret to Jerry.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Sixth Toe Surprise
programme.desc: Troy's extra toe causes him pain, and he hopes Dr. Ebonie can provide him with relief. Dr. Brad does his best to untangle a ballet dancer's twisted feet. Ramon turns to Dr. Ebonie for help with the massive sacks of fluid hanging from his leg and ankle.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Corn Crazy
programme.desc: Michael visits Dr. Sarah to see if she can help with his twisted toes. Robyn has big corns on her feet and hopes Dr. Brad can cut them out so she'll be able to walk pain free once again. Richard sees Dr. Ebonie for issues related to his missing big toe.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.desc: The Alldredges, Snowdens, McGees, and Winders all meet for the first time to answer tough questions about each of their journeys in plural dating and take a deep dive together into the season's juiciest moments.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quintuple Trouble
programme.desc: Adam returns to work, leaving Danielle to care for the quintuplets and Blayke by herself for the first time. On Adam's first day back, Hazel falls ill with a fever, leaving the family scrambling and Danielle feeling overwhelmed and alone.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Should We Stay or Should We Go?
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle realize they need a larger home, but house hunting proves stressful when they realize what a larger house will cost. Later, the family heads back to their hometown, and Danielle comes up with an idea that could solve all their problems.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: A Big Decision
programme.desc: Theresa brings healing to a couple whose son took his life as a result of being bullied and is inspired to read and comfort a group of teens who have also been victimized by their peers. Theresa and Larry begin deciding whether they should separate.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Theresa on Tour
programme.desc: We join Theresa on the road on her incredible cross-country tour. In city after city she delivers healing messages, but this time, she's going from sold-out crowds to an empty house, now that Larry has moved out.

programme.title: Unpolished: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: Big Mike's passing and the pandemic have left Jen in a financial mess, putting Bria's fairytale wedding in jeopardy. Bria and Lexi collaborate on a client's unique request for her daughter's birthday. The Martone ladies go to extreme lengths for help.

programme.title: Unpolished: Party On?
programme.desc: Jen discovers a secret bank account of Big Mike's. At the salon, Lexi tackles a set of mermaid nails that proves to be a 'sink or swim' situation. Bria and Matt are dealt some shocking news that leaves the wedding hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Unpolished: Bad Business
programme.desc: While Lexi works hard on a unique set of amusement park nails, Bria remains distracted by her personal life. When the salon has trouble making rent, Jen has no other choice but to ask Lexi to step it up, which leads to a mother-daughter blow up.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Thief
programme.desc: A mild-mannered businessman travels to Miami to confront the woman who has been living it up since stealing his identity.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Gronkowski
programme.desc: Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo catch a few 'street receivers', break into the reception with other 'suspected crashers' and laugh at golfers getting 'teed off'.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: With winter fast approaching, the Last Alaskans set out to hunt moose. Heimo and Edna team up together. Tyler draws on gut instinct to stalk an elusive bull. And Charlie soon discovers why the area is called 'Starvation Country.'

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Spirit of the Hunter
programme.desc: With winter just weeks away, The Last Alaskans are desperate to fill their smokehouses. The Selden's all pitch in to haul home Tyler's recent moose kill. Heimo and Charlie both worry they might not have meat for the winter months ahead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Pray for Snow
programme.desc: Winter in the Arctic Refuge usually means go time for The Last Alaskans but this year low snowfall is slowing them down - snow machines and dogsleds are useless in these trail conditions.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Race Against the Sun
programme.desc: As winter tightens its grip, the days grow shorter for The Last Alaskans and that means less daylight for checking traps. Heimo and Edna's fur count is way down and when wolves invade their traplines, Edna takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Predator Problems
programme.desc: As fall emerges, Atz Sr. sets off on a bear hunt in search of fresh meat. Eivin is determined to keep his family safe as a large bull moose becomes a neighbor, and a major cleanup is needed after an explosive wildfire prevention project.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Legacy of Billy Brown
programme.desc: The Wolfpack celebrates the remarkable life of their patriarch Billy Brown. Through never-before seen footage and interviews, Billy speaks to the bush legacy he was driven to establish, fueled by faith and his love of family.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided
programme.desc: As the Browns race to finish their cabin, temperatures plummet and an illness hits the family. Their ability to survive the winter rests on the brothers as they race to get essential supplies and complete the home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Predator Problems
programme.desc: As fall emerges, Atz Sr. sets off on a bear hunt in search of fresh meat. Eivin is determined to keep his family safe as a large bull moose becomes a neighbor, and a major cleanup is needed after an explosive wildfire prevention project.

programme.desc: The Wolfpack celebrates the remarkable life of their patriarch Billy Brown. Through never-before seen footage and interviews, Billy speaks to the bush legacy he was driven to establish, fueled by faith and his love of family.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided
programme.desc: As the Browns race to finish their cabin, temperatures plummet and an illness hits the family. Their ability to survive the winter rests on the brothers as they race to get essential supplies and complete the home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Recovery Road
programme.desc: As fall comes to a close, Atz Lee confronts the reality of recovering from his accident. To feed their families, Eivin and Jane venture miles at sea in search of massive halibut. The rush to complete the fall harvest puts Eve and Otto in harm's way.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The homestead is brewing with new beginnings. Sparks fly between Otto and Charlotte as they build a staircase to prepare for the winter. Atz Lee crosses a critical bridge on his road to recovery.

programme.desc: In a litter of six kittens, the only boy struggles to fit in with his sisters.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: River of the Dammed
programme.desc: Dropped by helicopter into the Macal River, Steve researches the morelet crocodile.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Painted Dog Puppy Drama
programme.desc: K'mana the African painted dog is pregnant with the zoo's first ever littler of this rare species, but her and the cub's father haven't always gotten along.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home
programme.desc: A treehouse escape grows into a full-time live-in treehouse when Pete lays eyes on the gargantuan Sitka spruce of his dreams for a hexagonal build on the coast of Oregon.

programme.title: Tanked!: Pete Rose Scores a Tank
programme.desc: Baseball legend Pete Rose wants Riverfront Stadium transformed into an aquarium, but his fiancée Kiana will not let the guys install Pete's dream tank inside their house. Wayde and Heather travel to Horry County, South Carolina to build a huge aquarium.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pushing Forward
programme.desc: Tia attempts to rescue a stray, but her leg injury holds her back. New parolee Mike struggles to balance working and being a parent. And, a family comes to Villalobos hoping to adopt a dog for their daughter, but finding a good match proves a challenge.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Going the Distance
programme.desc: After his adopter passes away, Tania heads to California to pick up a former VRC dog. A couple from Arkansas struggle to make a decision about which dog to adopt. And, after being rescued, a badly injured puppy is discovered to be a missing pet.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Movie: Baggage Claim

programme.desc: NCIS strikes a deal with a convicted murderer giving him a 48-hour furlough at his former residence, now McGee's home, in exchange for information that can convict his former cellmate, the murderer who deceived Gibbs and Fornell.

programme.desc: Callen and Sam are kidnapped when they follow an anonymous tip about a missing NSA agent. When the team discovers they are missing they realize it could have been a trap set by terrorists.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Expiration Date
programme.desc: When Callen and Sam are tasked with apprehending a spy contracted by the CIA, Sam is shot and the team enlists the help of Thapa, the elite Nepali soldier from their past, to help to find the shooter, Also, Kensi and Deeks have their first argument.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Savoir Faire
programme.desc: While the team investigates the death of one of three Afghanistan soldiers who are training in the U.S., they discover two other soldiers are missing. Also, Sam is back to work but his team worries it may be too soon.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Happy Family
programme.desc: When a father is savagely beaten to death, detectives find a family album of suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: F.P.S.
programme.desc: Violent computer games are blamed when a young woman is found strangled to death.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Mad Hops
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Bishop search the courts for a missing high school basketball player.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Intentions
programme.desc: When a devoted mother about to embark on a new life is murdered in her own home, detectives follow the evidence through a tangled web of relationships to unmask a killer no one could have predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: When a loving father and beloved basketball coach is ruthlessly murdered in Tennessee, police decode a confusing array of evidence to unveil a killer who is shockingly close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Unseen Assassin
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman and his closest friend are found shot execution style, leaving police with little to go on until a surprising development leads investigators to a killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: Snapped: Jaclyn Martin
programme.desc: Idle hands turn deadly when a life of comfort is jeopardized and leaves a beloved neighborhood bar owner dead in their wake.

programme.title: Snapped: Kimberly Baldwin
programme.desc: Indiana investigators learn just how manipulative and deadly a person's envy can be, when a devoted father is found violently murdered in his own home.

programme.title: Snapped: Carleen Charlie
programme.desc: When a wrathful killer strikes a small Alaskan village, investigators must untangle a truly twisted romance to find out what led to this rage filled stabbing.

programme.title: Snapped: Sylvia White
programme.desc: When a prominent insurance salesman is gunned down on a country road in Kinston, North Carolina, a 20-year-old secret comes to light and casts a shadow on a killer's flawless reputation.

programme.title: Movie: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Many years after a global cataclysm, civilization's remnants live in mobile predator-cities that consume all in their path. With the world's resources running out, it falls to a mysterious young woman to face her past and defeat the biggest city of all.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Something
programme.desc: Sanjay passes his stake in the Kwik-E-Mart to his millennial son, Jay, who turns it into a hip, health food market against Apu's insistence on tradition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4
programme.desc: Professor Fink uses science to turn himself into a man who women find attractive. Then, overwhelmed by the attention, he invents an algorithm to perfectly pair the lonely men and women of Springfield, realizing scientific exploration is his true love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow
programme.desc: After Bart accidentally sends a sweet homeless woman's cart into the river, he allows her to live in his closet for a small fee. When Lisa discovers that the woman is an incredible folk singer, she offers her own closet and plans a concert.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian
programme.desc: After performing CPR on a tased raccoon, Lisa discovers her calling to be veterinarian and becomes an intern at the local office, but learns a tough lesson when her neglected class hamster dies.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Marge-ian Chronicles
programme.desc: Lisa volunteers for a future one-way journey to Mars, much to Marge's chagrin. As she searches for a way to convince Lisa not to go, Marge hits upon the most devious strategy of all and volunteers to go along for the ride.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns Cage
programme.desc: When Smithers is devastated by Mr. Burns' lack of affection towards him, Homer makes it his mission to find him a boyfriend. Meanwhile, Bart orchestrates the removal of the lead in the school's stage production of 'Casablanca.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love
programme.desc: After promising Marge the trip of a lifetime, frugality gets the better of Homer when he makes a deal with a travel agent to be a courier of a top-secret briefcase in exchange for a discounted family vacation to Paris.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simprovised
programme.desc: After butchering a speech in front of all of his friends at work, Homer turns to improv comedy to gain back his confidence in his public speaking skills. Meanwhile, Marge decides to rebuild Bart's lacklustre treehouse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Buys a Boat
programme.desc: The gang attempts to open themselves up to the adventures of the sea after they purchase their 'new' boat.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac's Big Break
programme.desc: Mac finally gets a big break after answering a radio trivia question correctly. Meanwhile, Frank, Dennis and Dee take their bar banter to the internet for their own podcast.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Charlie: White Trash
programme.desc: After getting denied from the local pool club, Mac and Charlie aim to fix up an abandoned pool in order to beat the heat wave. Meanwhile, Dennis and Dee try to beat the heat in a more 'dignified' and 'upper-class' way.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac's Mom Burns Her House Down
programme.desc: Charlie and Mac set-up a truly odd couple after Mac's Mom burns the house down, while Frank discovers the importance of paternal care when Dee falls ill.

programme.title: Movie: Sicario: Day of the Soldado

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: A disease accelerates the aging process causing humans to die within days.

programme.title: Law & Order: Sweeps
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate after a convicted child molester, Dr. Joseph Vinton, is murdered on Rick Mason's controversial talk show. During the course of the investigation the detectives find evidence showing the murder was set up.

programme.title: Law & Order: Volunteers
programme.desc: Local residents become suspects when a homeless man is found beaten to death in an alley.

programme.title: Law & Order: Discord
programme.desc: A college student charges a rock star with rape, but he claims the act was consensual.

programme.title: Law & Order: Profile
programme.desc: After a number of neighborhood residents are murdered, the police follow the investigation to a local racist who is killing people he doesn't feel belong in his neighborhood.

programme.title: Law & Order: Black Tie
programme.desc: When a philandering husband is found dead, Briscoe and Logan suspect the man's bitter widow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Pride and Joy
programme.desc: Issues of abuse arise when a 17-year-old is the chief suspect in his father's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: Apocrypha
programme.desc: A woman is believed to be under the influence of a cult leader when she planted a bomb.

programme.title: Movie: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who has it all starts over with one client after a personal moral crisis.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Where Silence Has Lease
programme.desc: A mysterious being wishes to observe the many ways in which humans die.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Elementary, Dear Data
programme.desc: The Enterprise computer is programmed to create a worthy opponent for Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Outrageous Okona

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Assignment
programme.desc: An entity takes over Keiko's body and orders O'Brien to complete a secret assignment.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Let He Who Is Without Sin

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Things Past

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Ascent
programme.desc: Odo and Quark must rely on each other for survival while stranded on a desolate planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Rapture
programme.desc: Sisko is plagued by a life-threatening vision that may hold the key to Bajor's future.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: A disease accelerates the aging process causing humans to die within days.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: A Matter of Honor

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Measure of a Man
programme.desc: When Data refuses to be disassembled for research purposes, Picard must defend his rights.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Dauphin
programme.desc: Wesley finds romance with a young ruler whose powers could destroy the Enterprise.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Sue readies her arsenal and prepares to defend her remote camp from predators, while the Hailstones battle the elements in a crucial seal hunt.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Thin Ice
programme.desc: In Eagle, newcomer Cody Allen learns the hard way about the perils of dog mushing, while Erik Salitan hunts one of Alaska's apex predators.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Return to the Wild
programme.desc: The brutality of Arctic life forces Sue to call in outside help, while Andy’s apprentice makes a mistake that could prove fatal.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Breaking Point

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Search and Rescue

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: The Howling

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Ice Breakers: Dark Winter's End
programme.desc: The end of winter season is quickly approaching, and for Chip and Agnes Hailstone this means that they have one last chance to harvest fat caribou until late summer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Awakening
programme.desc: In the desolate Arctic of Alaska, the only thing you can depend on is change. And with summer quickly arriving, change is sure to come.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Life returns to the land of Alaska, but that does not mean that life in the Arctic wilderness is any less challenging.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Undersea Empires

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Secrets of the Civil War

programme.desc: Long-lost ships reveal the race to find gold in the California and Klondike gold rushes.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Kelly and Hyrum Lai always knew their picture-perfect life together would include a dog, but early on their Lab puppy Holly began displaying disturbing behaviour.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy
programme.desc: Cesar helps a group of hilarious comedians face their toughest critics: their own pets. Featured funny guys include Skyler Stone, Ralphie May, Lahna Turner and Paul Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs
programme.desc: Cesar stops by the motor home of NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick and his wife DeLana to help get their Chihuahua, Lo, in line before they welcome their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Playboy Playmates
programme.desc: Playboy founder Hugh Hefner's girlfriend, Miss November 2010 Shera Bechard, moved in to the Mansion with her Chihuahua mix, Willa, who needs Cesar's help to stop bullying Hef's 2-year-old King Charles spaniel Charlie.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Happy Birthday to Moo!
programme.desc: This week, animals are ailing and the doctors are determined. From a potbelly pig to hurt horses and injured cats, it’s as busy a week as ever for the staff at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dairy Poppins
programme.desc: There is truly no rest for the cold and weary vets of PVS during the winter season.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Lord of the Wings
programme.desc: This week at Pol Veterinary Services, the doctors treat an emu with a fractured leg.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Daned If I Do, Daned If I Don't
programme.desc: Dr. Pol rushes to rescue a two-year-old horse with a life-threatening infection.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Forgotten Fortresses of Terror
programme.desc: The desolate fortress of history's most infamous drug lord and a battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East contain a violent past; experts investigate the secrets of these mysterious compounds to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Archaeologists are finding hard proof of the prehistoric civilization that once thrived in the Amazon, and with the help of cutting-edge technology, these new discoveries reveal how these long-lost people built an advanced society in the hostile jungle.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse and then vanishes. Police soon learn the victim is a contractor with a troubled personal life, but identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle they must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: When two businessmen enter the hot real estate market in Denver, tensions boil over into a sordid tale of betrayal, rage, and murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: When two businessmen enter the hot real estate market in Denver, tensions boil over into a sordid tale of betrayal, rage, and murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Down the Canal
programme.desc: In Fresno, CA the body of Jody Lynn Wolfe washes up along the banks of Dry Creek Canal. Detectives can't imagine who could do this to the young teen. But the more they learn about Jody's life, the more they begin to realize this murder hits close to home.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Mystery at Palm Beach
programme.desc: After 30-year-old Lloyd Tobin is gunned down on a lakefront beach in Texas, his family launches their own investigation to help police solve the case. Then, more than 20 years later, closure comes from a surprising source.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Through a Child's Eyes
programme.desc: In 1982, 35-year-old JoAnn Tate was stabbed to death in her home in St Louis. Her kids Melissa, 7, and Renee, 4, nearly died. JoAnn's diary revealed a man Melissa ID'd as the attacker. Years later, new memories emerged that changed everyone's lives.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: The Eastside Killer
programme.desc: A twisted murderer preys on young women in Bellevue Washington, leaving their bodies sadistically posed. As police work to draw a crucial connection, an unconventional clue surfaces and leads them to an unlikely killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Killer Hand
programme.desc: A teen embarks on a journey to bring justice to the killer of his family, but must succeed before someone else dies.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bait and Kill
programme.desc: When Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears from the quiet Dallas suburb of Garland, what appears to be a straightforward missing persons case quickly morphs into a jigsaw puzzle of mistaken identity, fraud, and murder.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Play Dead
programme.desc: After 30-year-old single mom Kaye Robinson turns a suspicious late-night stranger away from her door, she has no idea the threat to her family is far from over. But with her young son in the home, she'll do everything in her power to keep him safe.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Into the Woods
programme.desc: The city of Fredericton is reeling when 8-year-old Jackie Clark goes missing. Determined to find her, Detective Mike Richards pushes the boundaries of police protocol.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Empire of Blood
programme.desc: The discovery of a mutilated corpse prompts a sweeping investigation into a trio of murders, an unreliable informant, and the most deadly cartel in Shreveport. But to close the case, Demery must face off with the man pulling all the strings.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A wealthy power-couple's marriage is in shambles. When the husband reports killing his wife in self-defense, it's up to Detective McFadden to prove, against long odds and high-priced attorneys, that this influential citizen is a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: The homicide of William Young has gone cold but not for Det. Joe Rasco. After more than a decade, he'll track down every player again to provide the answers to get justice once and for all for William and his family.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful V
programme.desc: The secret to perfect thin and crispy wood-fired pizzas at home is revealed.

programme.title: Good Eats: Age of Asparagus
programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about the first vegetable of the season: asparagus.

programme.title: Good Eats: Yes We Have No Banana Pudding
programme.desc: Banana pudding fans will love to smile at these cool and cream topped puddings.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics VIII: Tacos
programme.desc: Alton Brown seeks to refurbish two tarnished variations on tacos.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amsterdam
programme.desc: Look no further than the picture-perfect city of Amsterdam for the best eating in the Netherlands. Built on simple classics like bitterballen and haring, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the Dutch destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montreal
programme.desc: Known as the City of Saints, Montreal, Canada, is blessed with a cuisine formed by global flavours. From poutine to smoked meat to hand-rolled bagels, Andrew Zimmern digs in to the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading to Quebec.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Minutes away from desert trails, mountains and limitless outdoor adventures, Andrew highlights the delicious and iconic foods of Salt Lake City. Classic dishes include a pastrami burger, steak tips with mole and Utah scones.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Monica
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the laid-back eats of Santa Monica, California. Boasting miles of coastline, Santa Monica is home to spicy seafood soup, Chinese chicken salad, Tsukemen and many other dishes any seafood lover could want.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.
