programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair
programme.desc: Continual distractions almost derail part of a science project others are depending on; a trip to the bookstore finds the comfiest chair in the world, which may have mystical powers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishy Washy/ Poof's Playdate
programme.desc: Timmy's wish for a magical car wash that rejuvenated anything has unexpected consequences. Timmy wishes for fairy babies to play with poof.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Past and the Furious
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda take Timmy on a trip back in time to meet some of their past Godkids. But things take a turn for the worst when Timmy interacts with the past and alters the future.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cosmonopoly/ Hero Hound
programme.desc: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Main Drain
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: Trench Billies /Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trench Billies keep them hostage. Next, Squidward's complaints trigger a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Model Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Sister Sam / Perfect Chemistry
programme.desc: Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit; Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love of science.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Bestest Friend
programme.desc: In order to prove his humanity, Zim befriends a weird kid named Keef who won't go away; Zim and Dib fight a microscopic war with Dib's internal organs as the battlefield.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Germs/ Dark Harvest
programme.desc: ZIM, equipped with special germ-seeing goggles, becomes obsessed with cleanliness; Convinced that a doctor's examination will reveal that he is not human, ZIM harvest the children's organs and stuffs them into his own body.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Career Day/ Battle Dib
programme.desc: ZIM and Dib take tests to determine their careers and spend the day with their adult counterparts; In order to attend a meeting of the Swollen Eyeball Network, Dib must obtain a signature from the ever-elusive Professor Membrane.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Invasion of the Idiot Dog Brain/ Bad, Bad Rubber Piggy
programme.desc: In a mishap, GIR becomes one with the house and takes it and ZIM for a wild ride; In order to eradicate Dib, ZIM uses a time machine to send rubber piggies back in time and alter his enemy's past.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Plague of Babies/ Bloaty's Pizza Hog
programme.desc: ZIM must defeat his most disgusting enemy yet: a baby; Family Night is delayed until Gaz can rescue Dib from ZIM.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Bolognius Maximus/ Game Slave 2
programme.desc: ZIM and Dib each become walking slabs of cold cuts; Gaz terrorizes a boy who won't give her his Game Slave 2.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Walk for Your Lives
programme.desc: ZIM creates a very slowly expanding explosion and must get rid of it.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Abducted/ The Sad, Sad Tale of Chickenfoot
programme.desc: Mistaken for an earthling, ZIM is captured by two moronic aliens; Dib sets out to prove that Chickenfoot is a man in a costume.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Tak: The Hideous New Girl
programme.desc: A new girl comes to school and it's bad news for ZIM.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Mortos Der Soulstealer/ Zim Eats Waffles
programme.desc: Dib calls upon an other-worldly spirit to destroy ZIM/ Dib tries to capture ZIM on film doing evil deeds, but ZIM just sits in his kitchen eating Waffles.

programme.title: Invader Zim: Vindicated!/ The Voting of the Doomed
programme.desc: Dib is forced to see the skool's counsellor, Mr. Dwicky; It's time for class elections at skool.

programme.title: Invader Zim: The Fry Cook What Came From All That Space
programme.desc: ZIM's boss from Foodcourtia comes in search of ZIM, intent on bringing him back to work. ZIM must find a way to escape before the planet is stuck in a time warp that traps people on the planet.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Wreck It Zek
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Glitch
Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
programme.desc: Fired up from his most recent loss, Dante trains harder than ever to become as strong as Gwyn and Genesis. However, training is interrupted with news of a major match at the Infernal Tower! Someone is hungry for revenge against Arthur.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Mrs. Wilson

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Mrs. Wilson

programme.title: Drunk History: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Mary Mallon spreads typhoid fever everywhere she goes, and Cleopatra’s younger sister Arsinoe schemes her way in and out of power in Egypt.

programme.title: Drunk History: The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Joan of Arc guides the French through the Hundred Years' War. Genghis Khan becomes a legend amongst the Mongols. Mecca becomes a pilgrimage hub thanks to Mansa Musa.

programme.title: The Office: Turf War
programme.desc: When Robert drunkenly shuts down a nearby branch, Jim and Dwight join forces to outsmart a salesman from Scranton's uglier sister city.

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio
programme.desc: A stolen diaper leads to a high-speed car chase. With help from an old boss, Andy goes undercover as a janitor and stages a takeover.

programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Mother Knows Best

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Save the Date
programme.desc: Erica and Rick land back in Springfield for their 'Wedding Weekend', but Erica's dad may have other plans in mind. Desiry's dreams of her fantasy wedding might be halted when an ugly elephant in the room is revealed.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Engagements and Ultimatums
programme.desc: With no word from her father the day before the wedding, Erica and Rick move forward with their rehearsal dinner in hopes he'll reconsider. Bill is forced to deal with Bri's desire to have kids head on when they babysit her niece and nephew.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Brave New World
programme.desc: Meredith struggles with Derek's discovery of her mother's old diary. Elsewhere, Callie frets as she prepares for her first official date with Erica and Cristina stumbles into a part of the hospital that neither she nor her fellow residents have ever seen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: There's No 'I' in Team
programme.desc: Bailey spearheads a domino surgery in which each procedure depends on the success of the one before it. Meanwhile, Derek gets sole credit for the brain tumour study he did with Meredith, while Lexie goes to great lengths to get George to notice her.

programme.title: The Closer: Executive Order
programme.desc: The murder of two paramedics leads the LSPD and the FBI on two separate investigations on a case that could be the precursor to a major terrorist attack. Brenda fights to remain a step ahead while working with the counter-terrorism unit.

programme.title: The Closer: Old Money
programme.desc: One of Brenda's detectives is ambushed on the street and the main clue to figuring out the motive behind the attack is a garbage bag containing more than $37,500.

programme.title: The Closer: High Crimes
programme.desc: Chief of police Tommy Delk assigns Major Crimes a seemingly minor case involving the armed robbery of several medical marijuana dispensaries. When one of the robberies turns into a murder, the case tests Brenda's readiness to move up in the department.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Countdown to Meltdown
programme.desc: Ten singles count down to the fateful day they'll meet their mystery spouse at the altar, managing the reactions of their families while preparing for their weddings at breakneck speed.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Hello Stranger
programme.desc: Ten daring singles take the ultimate leap of faith and meet their spouse, a complete stranger, at the altar. Some couples feel that they're a match made in heaven. But for one picky groom, his bride is not what he expected.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Til Awkwardness Do Us Part
programme.desc: Couples meet the families they've married into.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: One October: Massacre on the Strip
programme.desc: Stephen Paddock lived the lifestyle of the rich and famous in Las Vegas. Gambling up to $1M a day, he was known as a ‘whale.’ But a trip to Vegas in October, 2017 leaves 58 dead.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Horror in Apartment 345
programme.desc: Gorgeous 27-year-old Sasha Samsudean appears to be sexually assaulted and is found strangled in her luxury downtown Orlando apartment. Shocking surveillance video and a slew of clues ultimately lead investigators to the killer.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer
programme.desc: 8-year-old Cherish Perrywinkle is lured out of a Walmart by a registered sex offender, but that’s just the beginning of a night of terror, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo
programme.desc: Savanna Greywind couldn’t wait to be a mom. But just before her baby is due, the pregnant 22-year-old disappears from her own apartment. When the baby turns up alive, the investigation reveals a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre
programme.desc: When five family members are found brutally murdered in the small Oklahoma city of Broken Arrow, police are on the hunt for a mass murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Monster Under the Bed
programme.desc: When three hotel workers don't turn up for their shift, a bizarre series of discoveries reveals a twisted workplace love triangle.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Overtime Overkill
programme.desc: Catherine Marlow's ambition to travel the world meant working the occasional weekend, but her dedication is her downfall when she's killed in the office on her day off.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Bloodshed in the Barn
programme.desc: Not long after taking a new job, beloved horse-trainer Fiona Southwell is found brutally murdered in a rural stable, and a small seaside town in Northern England must find the killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make a Prohibition-era classic: moonshine up to an ultra-high 180 proof. Building their own stills and mash, only one can be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: George Washington Rye
programme.desc: Three distillers compete to make a recipe created by George Washington himself. Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only one competitor can earn the prestigious title of Master Distiller for producing the first president's own signature liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Ice Shine
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Mark and Digger dig in to a new recipe that utilizes jars of expired oranges while Tickle and the Laws try making freeze-distilled apple liquor. Later, Mike and Jerry attempt birch bark shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Another Man's Mash
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe with master distiller Richard Landry. Mark and Digger crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make vodka, once the secret to surviving a Russian winter, and now America's most-consumed spirit. Mark, Digger and Tim judge as distillers design their own stills and mash in their own raw ingredients.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Another Man's Mash
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe with master distiller Richard Landry. Mark and Digger crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make vodka, once the secret to surviving a Russian winter, and now America's most-consumed spirit. Mark, Digger and Tim judge as distillers design their own stills and mash in their own raw ingredients.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: The Shape of the Gods/ Pyramids
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are icons of Ancient Egypt but they are not unique. There have been pyramids built across the world and they all have a long, twisted history, what did they really mean to the ancient people and why did they work so hard on them.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: The Birth of the Devil
programme.desc: Somewhere in the course of human history, a force of pure evil began to emerge, and the devil was born.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: Disposal of the Dead
programme.desc: Kara Cooney examines mummies, tombs, graves, and burials worldwide to learn how different cultures prepared their loved ones for the afterlife.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: Kara traces the dark link between religion and violence running throughout human history.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: Flesh and Bones
programme.desc: Whether it is the finger of a Catholic Saint or a mummified baboon in Egypt, humans have been treasuring the physical remains of our dead. Karen Cooney examines relics all over the world to find out why people give power to sacred flesh and bone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rain of Terror
programme.desc: A mother and an adventure addict enter the cloud forest of Ecuador and encounter unbearably wet conditions, lightning, cabin fever, trench foot and finger-slicing machetes during their 21-day challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with an optimistic naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Humidity, violent storms, caiman, and red-bellied piranha are just some of the threats they face. If they make it to day 21 they're in for a big twist.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Monster
programme.desc: A California Buddhist and an Oregon fisherman test their skills against the unforgiving Australian outback where harsh conditions, scarce food sources and saltwater crocodiles threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Hunted
programme.desc: Two survivalists are being hunted as they hunt for food in Belize.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bahama Drama
programme.desc: In the Bahamas two fans face relentless insects and aggressive sharks during hurricane season.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Shaken and Very Stirred
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake in the Philippine jungle rattles a thrill-seeking chef and a competitive hockey mom but lack of food and severe dehydration lead to a disastrous face-first fall. Later, two superfans are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Two strangers are dropped in one of the most dangerous African locations in the dead heat of Summer. Faced with aggressive hippos and charging elephants they quickly learn their place, but must mark their territory if they want to make it twenty-one days.

programme.title: Unpolished: The Maid of Horror
programme.desc: Old wounds are reopened as Jen and Lexi fight about financial tensions at the salon. Meanwhile, Bria focuses on throwing an extravagant bridal shower as Lexi works hard to finish a challenging 3D nail set, causing the divide between the sisters to grow.

programme.title: Unpolished: Making Moves
programme.desc: As Lexi takes a rare break from work to go on a blind date, Bria and Matt move into their new home. Meanwhile, Lexi's client has a big request for artwork-inspired nails that has Jen and Lexi heading to New York City for an eye-popping gallery event.

programme.title: Unpolished: Worried Sick
programme.desc: Overwhelmed, overworked and over it, Lexi reaches her breaking point. Jen realizes everyone needs a pick-me-up and plans a glamping trip for the staff! Before they leave, Lexi gets a cuckoo request for a set of talking bird nails.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Escape from Quarantine
programme.desc: Local quarantine restrictions are lifted, and the Busbys are ready to salvage the rest of their summer! Things take a turn for the worse when they discover a huge issue lurking in the kitchen walls. Parker faces an old fear, and Dale surprises the family.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints' Night Out
programme.desc: Blayke gets her big girl sleepover while the Quints invade Uncle Dale and Aunt Crystal's for the night. The kitchen renovation goes from bad to worse. The Busbys try to teach the girls to ride bikes. Hazel gets a surprise visit from her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: Unpolished: Castles and Dragons
programme.desc: As Jennifer gets tested for COVID-19, Lexi and Bria have a major falling out, forcing Lexi to make a difficult decision about attending her sister's nuptials.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn the Peacemaker
programme.desc: Mariah and Audrey are in town and share an exciting announcement with the family. Robyn tries to help Kody patch things up with Meri after their big fight on the property, but Kody pushes back and doesn't seem interested in fixing things.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints' Night Out
programme.desc: Blayke gets her big girl sleepover while the Quints invade Uncle Dale and Aunt Crystal's for the night. The kitchen renovation goes from bad to worse. The Busbys try to teach the girls to ride bikes. Hazel gets a surprise visit from her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: Unpolished: Castles and Dragons
programme.desc: As Jennifer gets tested for COVID-19, Lexi and Bria have a major falling out, forcing Lexi to make a difficult decision about attending her sister's nuptials.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn the Peacemaker
programme.desc: Mariah and Audrey are in town and share an exciting announcement with the family. Robyn tries to help Kody patch things up with Meri after their big fight on the property, but Kody pushes back and doesn't seem interested in fixing things.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Jeremiah's Dark Past
programme.desc: Jeremiah faces challenges as he opens his donut stand for the first time. Mary attends church for the first time since returning home. Shelly debates whether she should contact her biological mother. Dawn wonders about going home.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Going Full English
programme.desc: Despite initial success with the donut stand, tensions mount between Jeremiah and Carmela; Lowell decides to go Full English with a makeover; Mary must confront an Amish woman speaking out against her to the Bishop; Sabrina works at the donut stand.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Catching Up with the Quints
programme.desc: The Busbys are back and life is more chaotic than ever. Adam and Danielle have their hands full chasing after their 15-month-old quints. When a doctor recommends an extreme medical procedure for one of the girls, the Busbys face a difficult decision.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: All Eyes on Hazel
programme.desc: The Busbys take a road trip to Lake Charles to help Mimi with her garage sale, and Danielle learns some shocking news from her mom. Meanwhile Danielle and Adam wrestle with a difficult decision of whether or not to allow Hazel to have a risky eye surgery.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: Guilty... So You Think
programme.desc: Eight unique women cope with their incarceration in Gwinnett County Jail.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: Will I Get Out Today?
programme.desc: Nine women struggle to make sense of their time in jail and the actions that led to their incarceration. Four have just been arrested, three have been in and out of jail, one has been awaiting trial for five years and one is due to be released.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: I Told the Truth!
programme.desc: A young mother faces the prospect of seeing her young son only through the visitation glass.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: Mothers and Daughters Behind Bars
programme.desc: A veteran inmate learns that her son died in a tragic car crash. An inmate spends her first Mother's Day behind bars.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tiffany's Story
programme.desc: Despite moving to Houston with the solid support network of her boyfriend Aaron and her cousin Jasmine, Tiffany finds it difficult to break the cycle of depressed eating when her two roommates don't join her diet and leave the house every day for work.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Annjeannette's Story
programme.desc: When Annjeanette was nine, a campaign was established to send her to fat camp. She hated that her weight had become a source of public shame and she has struggled to overcome her food addiction. Now, she must change her habits to save her life.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Thief

programme.desc: Kim is devastated to learn Shengo's visa is expiring and wonders if there's a way to keep her Aussie in the country. Meanwhile, Kourtney and Scott are struggling to find privacy.

programme.desc: Flavours will clash in the Chopped kitchen when the first basket challenges chefs to bring a dill pickle-flavoured treat into their dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Meat Fight: Bison!

programme.title: Chopped: B.L.D.: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner!
programme.desc: The chefs set out to make a whole day's worth of amazing food when the cooking rounds are changed to breakfast, lunch and dinner. The judges hope the chefs who make it to the final round will be able to make lamb dinners to remember.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Chocolate Obsession
programme.desc: The appetizers must combine white chocolate and soft shell crab. A chocolate adult beverage and a chocolate showpiece dessert keep the delicious theme going in the second round.

programme.desc: The chefs set out to make a whole day's worth of amazing food when the cooking rounds are changed to breakfast, lunch and dinner. The judges hope the chefs who make it to the final round will be able to make lamb dinners to remember.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Chocolate Obsession

programme.title: Chopped: Dill Dilemma
programme.desc: Flavours will clash in the Chopped kitchen when the first basket challenges chefs to bring a dill pickle-flavoured treat into their dishes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Molly's Baby Shower

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Wheat Harvest
programme.desc: Everyone is busy with the wheat harvest on the farm, so Molly Yeh is making a meal to share with the farmers and keep them fueled and happy for the days ahead.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Curling Club
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes her most-prized Midwestern comfort foods with a twist. The hearty dishes include knoephla soup with the chewiest dumplings ever, sticky ribs and a side of sweet, tangy broccoli slaw with plump currants.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Purim Party
programme.desc: It's Purim, and Molly Yeh is celebrating with a festive meal, lots of drinks and plenty of fun. Her menu includes short rib gnocchi, red wine slushies and, for dessert, poppy seed hamantaschen.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: FAQ
programme.desc: Q and A answers starring a slow cooker Mexican soup and a healthy kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sharing Chocolate
programme.desc: Ree shares the good stuff with the chocolate lovers in her life, and she's starting big with a magnificent triple chocolate tiramisu as a thank you to her best friend.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: To the Nth

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lunch for the Crew
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is preparing a well-deserved lunch at the lodge for the cowboy crew. She makes a crispy-coated ranch favorite, chicken fried steak sliders piled on beautiful, warm buttermilk biscuits and served with buttermilk gravy.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Very Chocolatey

programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.desc: A student named Marc gets akumatized into Reverser. Convinced that Marinette and Nathaniel made a fool of him, he's determined to get revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Blanche Taylor Moore
programme.desc: When a small town preacher is hospitalized with a mysterious illness, North Carolina police uncover a string of suspicious deaths all centered around a Burlington woman with a hidden dark side.

programme.title: Snapped: Wendi Mae Davidson
programme.desc: When an airman from Lee, Maine vanishes only four months into his marriage to a country girl from West Texas, it triggers a multi-agency investigation that exposes a darker side to southern hospitality.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake
programme.desc: Stranger than fiction, a mom suddenly vanished. A dad under suspicion. There was no body, no weapon, no eyewitness and surprises along the way. Now, after all the twists and turns of four murder trials, the final verdict is in.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Frantic
programme.desc: After Christina, the twenty-three-year-old fashionista, went out to a high-end shopping mall on a Friday night and vanished police questioned everyone. The friends she was with. Her ex-model boyfriend.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Consumed
programme.desc: In January of 2014, a loving mother was found dead in her burned home near Paducah, Kentucky. What first appeared to be a terrible accident, turned into a lurid tale of deception and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client
programme.desc: Beverly Carter, a beloved mother, wife and a successful real estate broker had a long list of clients. Then she vanished. Like all-too-many missing persons cases, police knew it was a race against time to find her, before it was too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mother Daughter Tragedy
programme.desc: In 1993, a 29-year-old mother and her six-year-old daughter were found strangled to death in their home. Former prosecutor Kelly Siegler and former crime-scene investigator Yolanda McClary investigate seeking the person responsible.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Devoted (Fort Walton Beach, FL)
programme.desc: A vivacious mother of two mysteriously vanishes from beautiful Fort Walton Beach, FL. Just three days later, several people receive a cryptic group text from her but never hear from her again.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Room #10
programme.desc: The Cold Justice team returns to Fort Myers, FL to put their investigative skills to work on a 22-year-old murder case of a woman found shot in the head, covered in bloody sheets and dumped behind a community rec center.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Miss Congeniality (Yakima County, WA)
programme.desc: A young mother of three is found shot to death in her car that was pulled over on the side of a highway. Kelly and Yolanda face the difficult task of find a killer who seemed to disappear under the dark cover of night.

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Monster Among Us
programme.desc: A beloved Camp Hill, Alabama, community member was murdered in 2005.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Allen Prue & Patricia Prue

programme.desc: The discovery of a dead body casts suspicion on an unlikely high school romance.

programme.title: Snapped: Yalanda Lind

programme.title: Movie: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
programme.desc: When it's discovered that Mexican drug cartels are helping terrorists get into the United States, two agents are sent to the country to turn the major cartels against each other, but when the plan's cover is blown one of the agents goes rogue.

programme.desc: Lisa and Bart investigate Krusty's suspicious new 'Krustaceans' candy. Meanwhile, Homer wants a promotion at the nuclear plant and asks Marge to help him dress the part, and news anchor Kent Brockman struggles to find his feet in the changing media world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Pol New World

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Atlantis

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Egypt's Lost Metropolis
programme.desc: Mythical legends of a lost Egyptian capitol city continue to mystify archaeologists after a century of ongoing excavations; now, experts use the latest satellite infrared imagining to finally reveal the stunning ruins of an entire ancient metropolis.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Ark
programme.desc: A mysterious rock formation discovered on a Turkish hillside is believed to be actual evidence of Noah's legendary ark; experts use advanced radar technology to determine if biblical remains are hidden below or if it's simply a bizarre geological anomaly.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Ark
programme.desc: A mysterious rock formation discovered on a Turkish hillside is believed to be actual evidence of Noah's legendary ark; experts use advanced radar technology to determine if biblical remains are hidden below or if it's simply a bizarre geological anomaly.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Skull Grave
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: Demetra Smith is living in marital bliss with her new husband, but her happiness is cut short when her stepdaughter finds her shot execution style in her bed. Nicole Redlinger and the elite detectives at Atlanta Homicide set out to find her killer.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Malcolm and Lindy Robertson leave their family behind to sail the open seas of retirement together. Lindy eventually learns to love Malcolm's dream of sailing to Thailand but paradise soon turns into an unfathomable nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Opposites Can Kill
programme.desc: Young single mom Kathy wants a good life for herself and her son. That life soon includes wannabe rap star Juan, who has ambitions of his own. But their dreams clash and tempers erupt when Kathy decides she wants more out of life: no matter what the cost.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: The Marine's Wife
programme.desc: When a marine's wife went missing after going hiking, investigators turn to him for answers about why he waited 24 hours to report her missing. Eventually it becomes known that instead of hiking, she was meeting her lover.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: The Marine's Wife
programme.desc: When a marine's wife went missing after going hiking, investigators turn to him for answers about why he waited 24 hours to report her missing. Eventually it becomes known that instead of hiking, she was meeting her lover.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: No Body No Crime
programme.desc: Detective Postiglione is investigating a crime scene with a unique challenge: there is no victim. Pools of blood indicate something terrible occurred, but the young woman is nowhere to be found. It's up to Pat to find her and a possible murderer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Second Chance at Death
programme.desc: It's love at second sight, when Antoinette and Spencer hook up at their ten-year high school reunion. But after decades of supporting her husband financially, Antoinette realizes she'd be better off without... And the consequences are tragic.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Killing Time
programme.desc: Karla and Ray Porter are the envy of their neighbors. But after more than 20 years of marriage, Karla's loyalties are no longer with Ray. When he unearths her betrayal, his own dark side is revealed, and a bizarre chain of events is set into motion.

programme.title: Bride Killa: Blinded by Money
programme.desc: Within months of meeting, Amber Smith and Trenton Mallory are inseparable. They experience joyful highs and shocking lows on their way to wedded bliss. But before they make it to the alter, someone will discover the true meaning of 'til death do us part.

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Twins Betty and Peggy Woods survived an abusive home in rural Alabama. Years later, Peggy and Betty, stark opposites, are both tragically caught up in a sorted murder-for-hire plot. And only the hit man knows which twin was guilty.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Marathon Lover
programme.desc: Remy and Jennifer Ramsaran are living the American dream in Upstate New York. When Remy begins an affair with Jennifer's best friend he's unaware that his wife has become engrossed in a virtual affair. The only plausible outcome is a deadly one.

programme.title: Happily Never After: Ocean of Evil
programme.desc: Anita is head over heels for her new husband Michael. But the perfect pair are tragically separated when a wave of deception comes crashing down on them. Now detectives must find Michael's bride as they uncover the depths of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurses Lara Crockett and Ricardo Muscolino meet on the night shift. He's ambitious and sets about creating a rich life for them and she's happy to go along.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Malicious Hearts
programme.desc: Some women have ice running through their veins. They lack the instinct to care. A mom locks up and tortures her daughter like she's a prisoner-of-war; a helpful neighbor quietly kills her community; and lesbian lovers bash and burn a complete stranger.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Stephanie Santerre goes missing, everyone in her life falls under scrutiny. An emerging web of lies and deception leaves investigators to puzzle out the sordid truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Time Bomb
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes at the Pikes Peak National Bank, it's up to rookie detective Joe Kenda catch the culprits.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: You Live in What?: Witch House, Train Depot, and Water Tank
programme.desc: In Beverly Hills, California, a movie-set mansion becomes a witch's lair. In Colorado, a Wild West coal shed is riddled with bullet holes. In San Francisco, a ferry boat becomes the ultimate waterfront property.

programme.title: You Live in What?: Grain Silo to Masonic Hall
programme.desc: From a grain silo to a school, a Masonic hall to a grocery warehouse and even an entire city block, "You Live in What" tours amazing living spaces and introduces the people whose vision and creativity made it all possible.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.
